title: Tax Compliance Risks for Foreigners in Vietnam
metaDescription: A practical webinar for foreign individuals and businesses on avoiding common tax compliance pitfalls in Vietnam, led by WTP Advisory with Baker & McKenzie.
about: Join us for an insightful webinar designed for foreign individuals and businesses operating in Vietnam, led by WTP Advisory's experts in collaboration with Baker & McKenzie. Gain a comprehensive understanding of Vietnam's tax landscape, learn about key tax compliance obligations, and discover strategies to mitigate risks.
This webinar is a must-attend for foreign investors, business owners, and expatriates who wish to stay compliant and reduce tax liabilities in Vietnam.

details.label: Format
details.value: Online webinar — joining link provided upon registration

bulletSections.heading: What We'll Cover
items: Overview of tax compliance for foreigners in Vietnam
PIT and CIT obligations for foreigners and businesses
Work permit and government black list issues
Recent updates on tax laws and regulations

registration.heading: Save Your Seat
registration.subtitle: Tune in to our exclusive webinar for the latest updates.
